title: A Bag with Curiosity and a Blank Map

text_block_list.text:
It's my day off. Since the weather was nice, 
I decided to go for a walk…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yo, what a coincidence. 
You heading out here just now?
choice_data_list: Yeah, and you?
Yeah, and you?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Just to a place that 
slightly caught my eye.
choice_data_list: Caught your eye?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yeah… alright. If you don't have 
anything to do, care to join me?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
You took me on a fun journey the other day after all. 
Let me repay you by taking you on one.

I then ended up following Stay Gold, 
the place we ended up was…
choice_data_list: Huh, a zoo?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yup… Didn't I tell you? 
I've always loved animals.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Whenever I learnt something new in a picture book, I always ran towards the mountains to find the real thing. That was my everyday life when I was little.
choice_data_list: A bundle of curiosity and energy, huh.
A bundle of curiosity and energy, huh.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. 
…Anyways, let's go.
After that I followed Stay Gold and we made our rounds around the park and ended up in the "Savannah Area".
choice_data_list: Wha—, the giraffes and cheetahs are together!?

text_block_list.text: Having been presented with an unbelievable scene, I let my jaw drop. And that wasn't all, I saw that there were other herbivores nearby too.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Yeah, it's a mixed enclosure. 
Pretty interesting, right.
choice_data_list: Won't the giraffes get eaten?
Won't the giraffes get eaten?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Nope. Cheetahs won't hunt anything that's bigger than them. 
That habit is a great benefit to them.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Well, it'd be more difficult if it was lions instead. 
Those guys will hunt larger animals in packs after all.
choice_data_list: Whoa! That's really cool!
Whoa! That's really cool!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Right? There's so many exhibits here that take full advantage of these animals' behaviors. And there's still more to come.
As she finished her sentence, the exhibit before me suddenly looked more sparkly. The curious part of my brain throbbed to life.
choice_data_list: Behaviors… ah, there's info on this sign!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
A sign? Now that you mention it, 
I haven't seen one in a while.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Oh, something new's being added! 
"The development of mixed enclosures", huh.
choice_data_list: Do you mind if I take my time reading?
Do you mind if I take my time reading?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Fine by me, I was going to do the same thing. 
I'm interested in it.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
We sure took our time there. 
It's now… 2pm, right.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: I say it's the right time to get a meal, no?
choice_data_list: Sounds good! What are we going to eat?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, the destination's already been decided. 
What type of place it is… well, you'll just have to find out when we get there.
—An unfamiliar and spicy smell hit my nose. Words I've never seen before and dishes that I've never seen before.
After following Stay Gold and arriving at a "Multinational Restaurant", and facing the unknown fills me with— a mysterious sense of adventure.
choice_data_list: Stego… what did you just eat?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hm, oh this? This is "Pak Pet Tod". "Pak" means mouth, "Tod" means fried… and "Pet" means duck.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
All together it's "Fried Duck Bills". 
It's like a rice cracker and it's pretty good, you know?
It's just like she said, the bill… or rather, it had the shape of a duck's head looking at it from below.
It was still pretty fresh… While giving thanks life, I timidly took a single bite.
choice_data_list: …Oh?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh?
choice_data_list: I-It might be a rice cracker… and it's good.

text_block_list.text: I thought it'd have a much more weird and strange taste, but I was surprised with how delicious it was. Then a thought came to my mind.
choice_data_list: If it's like a rice cracker, then it'd be good with soy sauce.

text_block_list.text: With that flash of inspiration I called for a waiter, obtaining the soy sauce. Putting some on the duck bill, I gave it a try…
choice_data_list: It's delicious!
It's delicious!

text_block_list.text:
Ha! Hey, hey, that's pretty interesting! 
Gimme a bite of that!
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold

text_block_list.text: (Nom)

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Mmmmm! Mmmm, Mmmm! 
Oh that's good! Soy sauce works so well!
choice_data_list: Right! Let's try it with the chili sauce!

text_block_list.text: Compared to how I was backing away from these unfamiliar flavors… I now understood this way of eating and my appetite had increased ten-fold!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah… The texture and flavor… 
it looks like this would go well with soy sauce too.
(Nom)

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Mmm! Mmm mmm!
choice_data_list: Haha! I gotta try some after, but for now…
Haha! I gotta try some after, but for now…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Hm? 
What's up?

Looking at the duck bill on the plate made me think. 
Even though it might not look edible at a glance—
choice_data_list: Why did you want to eat duck bill?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Haha! Well, you see… 
I remember being asked that a while ago.
So I replied back saying "Thinking of eating eggs raw is even weirder".
choice_data_list: Right, is it weird?
Right, is it weird?
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold

text_block_list.text: Japan is a country surrounded by the sea after all. Since we have so many opportunities to eat fresh fish, we don't bat an eye to eating raw foods.
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
There's also… right. 
There's even a cultural reason—
When we left the restaurant, the sun had completely set. Passing the time restoring both our body and spirits, we were returning back at our own pace.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: I'm glad—
choice_data_list: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: I'm glad — that I ran into you at the school gate today.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Your curiosity took me far today.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …It truly was… a great day.
choice_data_list: Same here.

text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Stay Gold, I discovered some new things. 
Experienced many new things.

Although we didn't go across the ocean, 
it felt as though we went on an journey.
choice_data_list: I'd like to do this again sometime.
I'd like to do this again sometime.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yeah, me too.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
No matter where we go, 
as long as you're there it's sure to be fun.
